title: Culture / civilizational spread (illustrative)
description: Hand-smoothed regions for teaching: not a map of believers, syncretism, or borders. Regenerate: python3 tools/generate-extent-geojson.py

properties.name: Christianity (illustrative spread)
properties.note: Conventional world spread (Latin/West, Orthodox, Protestant, post-colonial)

properties.name: Islam (illustrative spread)
properties.note: MENA, N Africa, Sahel, Horn, Iran, C Asia, insular SE Asia, SW Asia nexus

properties.name: Hinduism (illustrative spread)
properties.note: South Asia core, soft periphery (not a census of faith)

properties.name: Buddhism (illustrative spread)
properties.note: SE Asia, East Asia, Himalaya, Sri Lanka nexus (schools not separated)

properties.name: Sikhism (illustrative spread)
properties.note: Punjab heartland, diaspora (schematic nexus, not count map)

properties.name: Judaism (illustrative spread)
properties.note: Levant, Mediterranean, European, and Atlantic diaspora concentration (illustrative)

properties.name: Shinto (illustrative spread)
properties.note: Japan, Ryūkyū overlap with folk practice

properties.name: Indigenous/Folk (illustrative spread)
properties.note: A selection of long-standing traditional surfaces (world map necessarily incomplete)

properties.name: Non-religious (illustrative spread)
properties.note: Secular-majority and state-secular zones (broad, schematic blurs)
